overview: A premium e-commerce platform with ultra-modern animations, 3D product showcases, dark/light theme, and a full shopping experience including cart, checkout, user accounts, admin dashboard, wishlist, reviews, and Stripe payments.
features: Full-screen hero with parallax and scroll-triggered animations
Stripe checkout with order success animation
Admin dashboard: product, order & user management
Product search with autocomplete and filters
Mobile bottom navigation and swipe gestures
